args.message: Look, I get it. You want proof. And I respect that. The thing is, fleet companies often use specialized service centers, and sometimes those records can be a bit fragmented when the vehicle changes hands. What I *can* tell you is that the mechanic I trust most in town gave this F-150 a thorough inspection. He checked the engine, the undercarriage, the brakes, and yes, he paid special attention to the transmission because he knows these trucks. He said it’s running strong, no funny business, and the transmission engages perfectly. He even commented on the solid feel of the frame – some surface rust, sure, but nothing concerning at all for a truck this age. He gave it his personal seal of approval. We can even have him talk to you directly if you'd like!
